chatSummary.title: Chat Summary
chatSummary.description: A concise running transcript summary of this chat: what the shopper asked, stated preferences, the recommendation given, and the outcome. Update it as the conversation progresses and especially before it ends.

consent.title: Marketing Consent
consent.description: True only if the shopper agreed to receive marketing emails.

interest.title: Interest
interest.description: What the shopper is interested in.
